import React from "react"; import "./Profile.css"; import profileData from "../data/ProfileData"; import profilePhoto from "../photo/profile_photo.jpg"; import GitHubLogo from "../logo/GitHubLogo.svg"; import TelegramLogo from "../logo/TelegramLogo.svg"; import GmailLogo from "../logo/GmailLogo.png"; import LinkedInLogo from "../logo/LinkedInLogo.svg"; const Profile = () => { const { name, role, cvFile, summary, education, researchInterests, workTimeline, companies, publications, contacts } = profileData; return (

{name}

{role}

{profileData.orcid && (

ORCID: {profileData.orcid}

)} {cvFile.map((cv, i) => ( Download {cv.name} (PDF) ))}

Professional Summary

{summary}

Education

{education.map((edu, i) => (
{edu.period}
{edu.title}

{edu.institution}

))}

Research Interests

{researchInterests.map((r, i) => ( {r} ))}

Technologies

{Object.entries(profileData.technologies).map(([category, items], i) => (
{items.map((item, j) => (
{item}
))}
))}

Work Experience

{workTimeline.map((job, i) => (
{job.period} {job.title}

{job.description}

))}

Companies & Collaborations

{companies.map((company, i) => ( {company.logo && ( )}
{company.name}

{company.role}

{company.period}
))}

Publications

    • ))}

Contacts

); }; export default Profile;
